pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, createHandlers
- Reads as: TypeScript module with type definitions for handler combinations (1-10 handlers), class Factory with createApp and createMethods methods
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper that creates app instances and combines multiple handlers in a single route; supports 1 to 10 handlers with generic type safety.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: TypeScript functions for context-based route inspection, uses WeakMap for caching
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Provides context helper functions to inspect matched routes and path information during request handling.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState
- Reads as: TypeScript WebSocket helper with event listeners (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) and context for sending/closing messages
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
- Safe summary: WebSocket adapter that upgrades HTTP connections with event-driven handler patterns.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: TypeScript cookie helper functions using parse/serialize utilities, supports signed cookies
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie management helper with support for regular and signed cookies, prefix handling (__Secure-, __Host-).

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: TypeScript function that returns a Client from hc with custom fetch implementation
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono
- Safe summary: Testing utility that creates HTTP client instances with mock fetch using Hono app.request.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime type
- Reads as: TypeScript runtime detection utility supporting node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Adapter helper that detects execution runtime environment and provides environment bindings.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: TypeScript CSS-in-JS helper with async style management, export from common.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/dom/css, src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS helper for server-side rendering with class name generation and view transitions.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify, toHash
- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for CSS class name handling and style string building
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: Core utility functions for CSS helper including hash generation, minification, and class builder.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: TypeScript fetch wrapper with header filtering, supports strict RFC 9110 compliance mode
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper that forwards requests with hop-by-hop header removal and security options.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: TypeScript dev helper for displaying route information with optional verbose and color output
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Development utility to inspect and display registered routes with handler names.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: raw, html
- Reads as: TypeScript template literal helper for HTML string building with escaping support
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper that safely escapes and concatenates values within template literals.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin
- Reads as: TypeScript module re-exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Safe summary: SSG helper module exporting static site generation utilities and middleware.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult
- Reads as: TypeScript SSG implementation with concurrent fetching, file writing, and plugin hooks
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/client/utils
- Safe summary: Static site generation engine that fetches routes, generates content, and writes to filesystem.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/hono, src/router, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Path and route utility functions for SSG including join, dirname, and dynamic route detection.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: TypeScript middleware for controlling SSG behavior in dynamic routes
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: Middleware for enabling/disabling SSG generation and handling dynamic route parameters.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: TypeScript module re-exports from stream.ts, sse.ts, and text.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helper module exporting various streaming methods including SSE and text streaming.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: TypeScript function using TransformStream and StreamingApi for general streaming responses
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Base streaming helper that creates chunked responses with error handling and abort support.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: TypeScript SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming with event, id, and retry message support
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming implementation with proper headers and chunked transfer.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: TypeScript function that wraps stream with text/plain content type and security headers
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/utils/stream
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper that adds nosniff header and text/plain content type to stream response.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: TypeScript module re-export from accepts.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header parsing helper module exporting the accepts function.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, defaultMatch
- Reads as: TypeScript function to parse Accept headers and find best match from supported types
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header helper that parses and matches client capabilities with quality value sorting.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: TypeScript module re-exports from types.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Connection information helper module exporting type definitions.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: TypeScript type definitions for connection info including remote address and port
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Type definitions for HTTP connection information including remote address type and net address details.
